statements.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from "products" where ("products"."deleted_at" is null)

select "products".*, (select count(*) from "product_prices" where "products"."id" = "product_prices"."product_id" and "product_prices"."deleted_at" is null) as "prices_count" from "products" where ("products"."deleted_at" is null) order by "created_at" desc, "products"."id" desc limit 10 offset 0

select count(*) as aggregate from "notifications" where "notifications"."notifiable_type" = 'App\Models\AdminUser' and "notifications"."notifiable_id" = '01KBAZZ18W0VWD47744CK4B1MD' and "notifications"."notifiable_id" is not null and json_extract("data", '$."format"') = 'filament' and "read_at" is null
